# Workspace Agents

This workspace includes custom agents tailored for the Angajeaza project.

## Available Agents

### Angajeaza Astro + Firebase Agent
Located: `.github/agents/angajeaza.agent.md`

Specialized for working on the Angajeaza un Robot website built with Astro and deployed to Firebase Hosting.

**Use this agent when:**
- Making updates to pages, layouts, or styles
- Configuring Firebase hosting or domain settings
- Deploying changes to the live site
- Optimizing site performance
- Debugging build or deployment issues

**Example prompts:**
- "Add a new section to the homepage"
- "Fix the vite.config.js for the custom domain"
- "Deploy the latest changes"
- "Add a new page to the site"
- "Update the sitemap configuration"
